summary: Backend API testing complete for new AI Village features. All 25 tests passed. Day/night cycles (7 phases), guild system (5 types), biblical demons (9 types across 4 ranks), AI mood system, and Sirix-1 scan protection all verified working.
passed_tests: POST /api/time/phase - returns current phase based on timezone offset
GET /api/time/phases - returns all 7 phases: dawn, morning, afternoon, dusk, night, witching_hour, pre_dawn
POST /api/guilds - guild creation works with founder validation
POST /api/guilds/{id}/join - join validation works (checks user exists, not already in guild)
GET /api/guild-types - returns 5 types: trade, combat, crafting, exploration, mystical
GET /api/demons/{demon_type} - returns specific demon with biblical_origin
GET /api/infestation/{location_id} - returns infestation level (defaults to clear)
POST /api/demons/spawn/{location_id} - spawns demons based on time danger level
POST /api/demons/{encounter_id}/attack - combat flow with victory/continue states
GET /api/villagers/{id}/mood - returns mood state with trade/service info
POST /api/villagers/{id}/interact - updates mood based on interaction type
GET /api/scan/{target_id} - scans entities; Sirix-1 returns distorted data
GET /api/profile/view/{user_id} - views profiles; Sirix-1 masked with cryptic values
critical_code_review_comments: Day phases use timezone offset only - never precise location (privacy-safe)
Biblical demons have proper rank weighting (lesser more common, arch very rare)
Mood system correctly tracks refuses_service_to list and shop_open status
Sirix-1 profile properly masked with random cryptic symbols (∞, ???, █████, etc.)
Scan endpoint returns distorted data for transcendent entities
seed_data_creation: None required - tests use existing villagers and create test guilds
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: Day/night phases affect demon spawn rates (witching_hour=1.0 danger, afternoon=0.1). 9 biblical demons across 4 ranks (lesser: imp/shade, standard: legion_soldier/tempter, greater: asmodeus_spawn/mammon_collector/belphegor_sloth, arch: beelzebub_avatar/abaddon_destroyer). Guild system supports 5 types with bonuses. AI mood system tracks interactions per player - negative interactions can close shops and refuse service. Sirix-1 scans return distorted data with cryptic symbols.

verification_data.sirix_protection: Scan returns distorted=true with error_code like TRANSCENDENT_ENTITY
